label: Salt Inventory Vault
description: Salt Inventory Vault occupies a sealed basalt chamber off the foundry floor, constructed with load-bearing ribs keyed to Brineshade Terminator City’s engineered tolerance for tidal strain. Salt-cemented shelves and bin walls rise in rectilinear ranks, their surfaces vitrified against mineral haze and abrasive grit tracked in from the terminator flats. Scored floor channels descend to covered drains, keeping bulk salts and metal stock dry and segregated under regulated, low-glare clerestory spill. Stenciled bay markers and mass-calibrated platforms formalize custody of materials essential to precision work under Saltharrow’s pronounced gravitic gradients.
